coord_space: normalized to color (top-half) frame, origin top-left

fields.com: mask center of mass [x,y] -> contact-shadow x (smooth over time)
fields.face: head-region (top 45%) mask centroid [x,y] -> camera zoom-to-face target
fields.bbox: [x,y,w,h] character bounds; kp: [[x,y,score]...] raw pose keypoints
